_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY — not loaded (filename starts with underscore). Copy to a file like 'allegheny.json' and populate ONLY from formal public records (bar disciplinary actions, court opinions making findings, published misconduct findings). Every entry MUST cite its specific source. The names below are fictional and illustrative.
name: Jane Q. Example
finding: Brady violation found on direct appeal (illustrative, fictional)

_comment: Any role outside prosecutor / judge / police / forensic-analyst lands in the 'other official' bucket (still sourced from a formal record). Illustrative and fictional.
name: Robin Q. Sample
finding: Formal finding of fabricated interview notes (illustrative, fictional)
source: State Dept. of Human Services, Case No. 0000 (EXAMPLE)
